body.title: Migrate Igor's direct file/bash calls to use workspace device MCP tools
body.result: run_bash routes through WorkspaceDevice.workspace_run_bash; read_source_file routes through workspace_read_file. write path already blocked by IGOR_SELF_EDIT_ENABLED=false.
body.description:
Igor currently makes direct file system and bash calls in several tools (pe_chain, read_source_file, patch_source_file, run_bash). Migrate these to call the workspace device via MCP instead. This force-tests the rack foundation through Igor's daily use — every coding sprint becomes a live integration test of workspace tools.

Secondary benefit: makes Igor's file operations inspectable via the shim spy log (T-shim-traffic-spy), giving a full trace of what Igor read/wrote during any pe_chain run.

Lowest priority in this batch — do after Monday validation tickets are green.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/tools/pe_chain.py, devices/igor/tools/run_bash.py, devices/igor/tools/source_tools.py (or equivalent)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; Igor calls tools, does not contain them; workspace device must be running before this migration can go live
**Scope boundary:** IN — replace direct file/bash calls with workspace MCP tool calls; OUT — change Igor's tool API surface, affect pe_chain phase logic
**Completion criteria:** pe_chain runs a full INIT→CLOSE cycle using workspace MCP tools; datacenter_logs/shim/trace/ shows workspace tool calls during the run; no direct subprocess.run or open() calls for source files in pe_chain

**Note [2026-06-08 11:08]:** pe_chain.py, run_bash.py, source_tools.py are absent from devices/igor/tools/ — this is a from-scratch port, not a migration. pe_chain is the full INIT→CLOSE coding chain. Given Igor-coding-retired, verify: (a) port pe_chain into UU for DickSimnel use? (b) stale — defer/close? Needs Akien decision before sprint.
